services.title: Electrical Diagnosis
services.description: Find the real problem behind mysterious electrical issues. No guessing, no throwing parts at it.

services.title: Alternator & Starter Service
services.description: Complete alternator and starter repair and replacement. Get your car starting and charging properly.

services.title: Battery Testing & Service
services.description: Professional battery testing and replacement. Know before you're stranded.

services.title: Wiring Repair
services.description: Fix damaged wiring, shorts, and connection problems that keep coming back.

about.heading: One Shop, Real Solutions
about.body: We're the Chattanooga auto electrical team that refuses to give up on your car. When three other shops can't fix it, we can.

reviews.name: George B.
reviews.text: Jason is an excellent mechanic. Fixed my basket case Cherokee when nobody else could.

reviews.name: Heather G.
reviews.text: Excellent people, highly recommended! Visiting from Chicago with electrical issues - they checked everything thoroughly and got us sorted out.

reviews.name: Ruth K.
reviews.text: Took my van to three other shops - nobody could fix it. He refused to give up. Honest and capable - if you're lucky enough to get him, jump on it.

cta.heading: Ready to Actually Fix Your Car?
cta.body: Stop throwing money at shops that can't solve the problem. Get it diagnosed right the first time.
